name: ricardofrantz--bun-do-api
description: Manage bun-do tasks and projects — add tasks, edit tasks, delete tasks, toggle done, manage subtasks, and log project progress entries. Use when the user says "add a todo", "update task", "remove task", "mark done", "add subtask", "log progress", "update project", or any variant of managing tasks/projects. Also use when an agent finishes work and needs to record progress. Triggers on: "todo", "task", "remind me", "due", "deadline", "payment", "bill", "backlog", "what do I need to do", "what's overdue", "add to my list".
